reason: Both answers correctly identify the 100% exclusion, cite Section 1202, the post-9/27/2010 acquisition date, the 10 million or 10x basis cap, and correctly note no AMT preference and no NIIT on the excluded gain. The two answers are essentially equivalent in substance, structure, and length.
